footer.legalDisclaimer: ScaleLogix A.I is a consulting and infrastructure licensing company. We do not offer business opportunities, franchises, or passive investments. Nothing in our materials should be interpreted as a guarantee of income, success, or results. All earnings examples are illustrative only. Your results will vary and depend on your niche, offer quality, marketing execution, client demand, and personal effort. ScaleLogix operates under the jurisdiction of Florida, USA.

cards.title: Your Window
cards.stat: 85% of businesses still not using AI
cards.description: Only 15% of the 33 million U.S. businesses have adopted AI. There is a 2-3 year window before saturation. Early movers are securing clients with minimal competition.
bullets: Most local service companies still rely on missed calls, slow follow-up, and manual admin.
This creates a direct sales narrative around revenue recovery, not vague automation promises.
The buyers already understand labor costs. AI replaces expensive inefficiency with margin.

items.title: How the infrastructure performs after launch
items.label: Launch Review

sections.heading: Our infrastructure is already *proven* at scale.
Everything you need to know to get started with *confidence.*
sections.subheading: The commercial model, the operating role, the timelines, and the expectations are all laid out here.

items.question: What exactly is this opportunity?
items.answer: You own an AI agency that sells automation solutions to businesses without building anything yourself. We license you our proven infrastructure, handle the tech, run your marketing, and close deals for your agency.

items.question: Why do you need me? Why not just do this yourselves?
items.answer: We scale faster with outside capital than reinvesting our own. By licensing our infrastructure to partners, we expand into different niches and markets without creating a single internal bottleneck.

items.question: Do I have to do the sales or marketing myself?
items.answer: No. We generate leads and hire, train, and manage commission-only sales reps who close deals on your behalf at a 20-25% close rate.

items.question: Do I need technical skills or AI experience?
items.answer: No. We handle all technical work including system design, deployment, maintenance, and client fulfillment.

items.question: How much time do I need to commit?
items.answer: Most partners dedicate 3-5 hours per week. The operating model is designed around CEO-level oversight, not owner-operator labor.

items.question: What's the upfront investment?
items.answer: Investment tiers range from approximately $27,000 to $75,000 depending on the package and launch scope.

items.question: How soon will I see a return?
items.answer: Month 1-2 is usually the build phase. Most partners close a first deal in month 3. By month 6 many are near break-even, and by month 12 the model is designed to support $8K-$25K per month in profit.

items.question: Isn't the AI market getting saturated?
items.answer: Not even close. Only a small percentage of the 33 million U.S. businesses are using AI in production. The opportunity remains early, especially for local and service-based operators.

items.question: How do I actually make money?
items.answer: Clients pay an upfront setup fee, typically between $3K and $15K, plus recurring retainers that can range from $1.5K to $15K per month depending on the service and market.

items.question: Is there any kind of guarantee?
items.answer: The positioning on the live page states that your agency is fully built and launched within 60 days or the investment is returned. Specific commercial terms should always be confirmed directly with ScaleLogix.

items.question: Can I sell this business down the road?
items.answer: Yes. You own the business, the brand, the clients, and the revenue. That creates the possibility of selling the asset later, subject to market conditions and business performance.

items.question: What kind of support do I get?
items.answer: Support includes a dedicated Slack channel, a COO managing operations, recorded training, weekly strategy calls, and an ongoing support process once the agency is live.
